entries.objective: mathcrew PR#28 Speech Bubble 기반 교육콘텐츠 전달방식 검토 + 현재 기술스택(Three.js 0.183.2 + WebGL2 + TS + Bun + Vite + ts-fsrs) 위에서 최신/최선의 교육콘텐츠 전달방식 리서치
entries.rationale: mathcrew v2는 3D 수학학습 월드(5개 행성)에서 약수/배수 개념을 VT(Variation Theory) + CRA(Concrete-Representational-Abstract) 프레임워크로 가르침. PR#28은 고정 HUD 패널에서 캐릭터 추종 말풍선으로의 마이그레이션을 완료. 이 리서치는 말풍선 이외에 3D 교육환경에서 콘텐츠를 더 효과적으로 전달할 수 있는 최신/최선의 방법이 있는지 조사함.

currentApproach.name: Character-following CSS Speech Bubble
currentApproach.dataModel: SpeechBubbleContent (title, body, phase, vocabularyIntro, successCriteria, promptText, promptKey, beatIndex, totalBeats)
currentApproach.hudSlimmed: src/hud/hud.ts (530 LOC — progress bar, mini-telemetry, victory, dev panel)
currentApproach.architecture: game-loop → SpeechBubbleContent → speech-bubble.ts (follows character) + HudUpdateData → hud.ts

teachingFramework.interactionModes: pickup-drop, resonance-trial-sequencer, predict-verify, select-scan, observe, divisor-judge, observe-discovery, array-builder, venn-diagram, observe-factor-table
teachingFramework.surfaces: signal-console, constellation-triptych, resonance-loop, beacon-anchored, observatory-overview, orbital-array-deck, intersection-lens, number-line-rail

pr28Impact.verdict: HUD 고정패널 → 캐릭터추종 말풍선 마이그레이션 완료. Enter-advances-beat 프레임워크 및 teaching-flow.ts 미변경.

identifiedGaps: Speech bubble is CSS overlay — no 3D depth integration or occlusion
Text rendering is DOM-based — no in-world diegetic UI
No spatial audio cues for teaching content transitions
No adaptive content pacing based on learner behavior
No micro-animation or visual storytelling for abstract concepts
No multi-modal content (only text + key prompts in bubble)
Vocabulary terms shown inline — no spatial/3D highlighting of referenced objects
Mini-telemetry is HUD-only — no in-world feedback visualization

decisions.RQ1: external — EdTech UX research + 3D education platforms + game-based learning studies for content delivery patterns
decisions.RQ2: external+context7 — Three.js text/UI rendering libraries (troika-three-text, CSS3DRenderer, three-mesh-ui, htmlmesh)
decisions.RQ3: external+internal — Interaction paradigms for educational pacing (spatial triggers, adaptive timing, multi-modal cues)
decisions.RQ4: external — Cognitive load theory + Mayer multimedia learning principles applied to 3D educational spaces
decisions.RQ5: external+context7 — Three.js ecosystem tools for enhanced content delivery (three-mesh-ui, troika, lottie-three)
decisions.RQ6: internal+external — Teaching flow architecture adaptation paths for richer multimodal delivery
decisions.RQ7: external — Performance comparison: CSS overlay vs CSS3DRenderer vs WebGL-native text with n8ao+postprocessing pipeline

requirements.description: Identify content delivery approaches superior to CSS speech bubble for 3D math education
Evaluate in-world (diegetic) vs overlay (non-diegetic) content rendering for teaching effectiveness
Assess Three.js ecosystem libraries for advanced text/UI rendering (troika-three-text, three-mesh-ui, CSS3DRenderer)
Design interaction patterns that improve educational pacing beyond Enter-advances-beat
Apply cognitive load theory and Mayer's multimedia learning principles to content delivery design
Maintain 60fps rendering performance with enhanced content delivery in n8ao+postprocessing pipeline
Preserve compatibility with existing teaching flow (beats, CRA, VT) and ts-fsrs spaced repetition
Support multimodal content delivery (text, visual cues, spatial highlighting, micro-animation)

questions.text: What are the current best-practice UI patterns for delivering educational content in 3D learning environments? (diegetic UI, spatial UI, AR-like annotations, visual novel panels, proximity-triggered overlays)
How do modern Three.js text/UI rendering libraries compare for in-world educational content delivery? (troika-three-text SDF, CSS3DRenderer, three-mesh-ui, CanvasTexture, HTML overlay)
What interaction paradigms best support educational pacing in 3D game environments? (auto-advance timing, spatial proximity triggers, gesture-based, adaptive AI-driven pacing, multi-modal cues)
How do cognitive load theory and Mayer's multimedia learning principles inform the design of content delivery UX in 3D educational spaces for elementary math?
What Three.js ecosystem tools could enhance the current content delivery pipeline? (troika-three-text, three-mesh-ui, htmlmesh, drei text patterns, postprocessing text effects)

How can the existing teaching flow architecture (beats + CRA phases + VT dimensions + interaction modes) be adapted for richer multimodal content delivery while preserving the existing SpeechBubbleContent/TeachingBeat contract?
What performance trade-offs exist between CSS overlay, CSS3DRenderer, and WebGL-native text rendering for 60fps educational content in scenes with n8ao + postprocessing effects pipeline?

devconPhase: Phase 2 → Phase 3 transition — Data model (TeachingBeat, SpeechBubbleContent) and basic rendering pipeline exist (Phase 2). Research targets enriched content delivery with potential adaptive/AI-first patterns (Phase 3 aspiration).

codebaseUpdates.title: feat: migrate HUD teaching panel to character speech bubble
codebaseUpdates.impact: HUD 2089→530 LOC. New speech-bubble.ts 717 LOC. SpeechBubbleContent type added to teaching.ts. Ontology frontend.ts/runtime.ts updated with SpeechBubble view + binding.
codebaseUpdates.verifiedBy: bunx tsc + bunx vite build + audit:doc-contracts + audit:spatial-support

recommendations.rationale: H-A (Enhanced CSS Overlay) wins on: (1) lowest implementation cost (1-2 weeks additive), (2) zero WebGL render loop changes — no regression risk to n8ao/postprocessing pipeline, (3) highest reversibility (CSS-only changes, fully revertible), (4) pedagogical soundness confirmed by Mayer P8 Segmenting + CLT (speech bubble + Enter-advances-beat is correct for elementary), (5) CognitiveLoadManager adds adaptive content density (3 tiers) without architecture change, (6) prefers-reduced-motion WCAG 2.3 compliance built-in, (7) prototype passes 9/9 eval cases including beat sequencing invariant preservation.
recommendations.alternativeRationale: H-B (Hybrid Diegetic + Overlay) is the Phase 3 evolution path. Valid when: (1) CRA Concrete phase needs in-world spatial annotations (SpatialAnnotation entity), (2) Mayer Spatial Contiguity principle demands labels near 3D objects, (3) troika-three-text SDF + n8ao compatibility is browser-validated (gap C-B01-1). Higher cost (6-8 weeks) but closes depth/occlusion gap for teaching-critical scenes. Prototype passes 8/8.
whatWouldChangeDecision: If CRA Concrete phase requires spatial labels NEAR 3D manipulatives (Mayer Spatial Contiguity) → H-B becomes mandatory for motivate/explain/demonstrate phases
If troika-three-text + n8ao benchmark shows <5% FPS impact on Chromebook → H-B migration cost justified
If elementary learner testing shows speech bubble text insufficient for abstract concepts → add troika SDF labels as supplementary (H-B hybrid)
If accessibility audit requires screen reader support for in-world labels → CSS overlay (H-A) remains superior (DOM accessibility)
If audio narration (Mayer P9, d=0.87) is implemented first → H-A's simplicity is even more valuable as the high-ROI investment

experiments.description: Browser benchmark: CSS overlay z-order vs n8ao postprocessing canvas stacking context (gap NE-02). Validate that speech bubble DOM layer renders correctly above postprocessed WebGL output.
If H-B adopted: troika-three-text SDF + n8ao EffectComposer pass ordering benchmark. Validate OverrideMaterialManager.workaroundEnabled=true + renderBeforeCompositor pattern (gap C-B01-1).
Audio narration pilot: Web Speech API Korean TTS quality test with 3-5 teaching beats. Measure learner engagement delta per Mayer P9 Temporal Contiguity.

evaluatorGateDetails.summary: ACCEPT — 14/15 PASS, 0 FAIL, 1 N/A. Independent adversarial evaluation by evaluator agent. All upstream pipeline artifacts verified: 14 sources (40+ provenance-tagged claims), 21 D/L/A-classified objects, 12 scenarios (11-dim scoring, 2 revision rounds), recommendation with 7-point rationale + 5 reversal conditions. Both prototypes independently verified: bun test 74/74 (H-A) + 30/30 (H-B), bunx tsc --noEmit clean. H-A (Enhanced CSS Overlay) accepted as Phase 2 recommendation. H-B (Hybrid Diegetic) documented as Phase 3 evolution. H-C (Full WebGL) correctly deprioritized (staleness + WCAG insufficient evidence).

previousRound.reason: 11/15 rules failed — upstream pipeline T2-T6 was incomplete (all state files empty except T1 intake). Correct rejection.

caveats: 5 evidence-gap contradictions remain — tracked via next-experiments
7/12 scenarios have partial evidence sufficiency — validation work continues in implementation
Propagation paths are partial (designed, not implemented)
H-B evolution depends on NE-B-01 (troika FPS benchmark) — p0 before H-B work
